titleStmt.title: SII 6.226Y: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 226. (A.R. No. 259 of 1897). ON ANOTHER PILLAR IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© kalyāṇaṁ jagatāṁ tanōtu parama
ḥ puṇyaikalabhyaḥ pumān® krīḍākrō
ḍatanustadātvanibiḍaprōdbhinnarō
mōdgamaḥ . svinnāṁgīṁ nijasaṁ
ggamādiva mahīmaṁbhōnidhēru
dvavān® dēvō yaḥ prakaṭīcakā
ra nitarāṁ bhūdāratāmātmanaḥ .
Asti svastarudānada¨rppavijayī
lōkōttarakhyātimān® śrīmā
n® kāṭayabhūmiThe letter mi is engraved below the line in the original. The insertion is denoted by a × sign above its proper place in the line.pālatanayō vēmā
bhidhānaḥ kṛtī . yasyāka¨rṇnanamā
tra Ēva ripuṣu prāptēṣvaraṇyaṁ sadā
kāṁkṣaṁtyapparasāṁ gaṇā navavaradru
ptyai mahāṁtaṁ raṇaṁ . vikasitava
danaṁ vilōkya vīraṁ raṇabhuvi
kāṭayavēmabhūpatīṁdra
ṁ . ripuṣu niyamitāpi vēdhasō
tkā kathamiva tiṣṭhati tēṣu vīralakṣmīḥ
. tasyābhūtprathamaḥ purōhi
tagaṇēmātyēṣu cōtka¨rṣavān®
śrīmānappayaviprava¨ryyatana
ya[ḥ .*] śrīpeddināmā dvijaḥ . yē
nātmasthitamaṁtraśaktivibhavairu
tsāhajātōdayai¨rdātu¨rvvē
manṛpasya nityamakhilāssaṁpādi
tāssiddhayaḥ . viprānvayakṣīra
mahābdhicaṁdrē yasmin® dvijēṁdrē bhu
vi dānaśauṁḍē . vēmaprabhōrāśrita
rakṣaṇēchchā mahatyabhūtkī¨rtiru
dārakī¨rtēḥ . śrīśailādiṣu pāva
nādriṣu mahātī¨rtēṣu gaṁggādi
ṣu prāptābhīṣṭabahuprakā
raphalavān® bhaktō bhavānīpatēḥ . dra
ṣṭuṁ ni(ṁ)¨rmalamānasōtivimalaṁ
kūlaṁkaṣāyāṁ svayaṁ
kṛṣṇāyāmamarēśvarasya paramaṁ sthānaṁ
kadāciggataḥ . tat stānādhikṛtān® kṛtā
¨rghyavidhināhūya ṣaṭpūjitā
nētēbhyastatsamayā¨rhamūlyavi
bhavakrītaṁ tatkālōcita
rapurō

śākābdē vasukhānalēṁddugaṇi
tē māsādhikāṣāḍakē pakṣē ca
prathamē dvitiyyadivasē saumya
sya vārē śubhē . peddiḥ puṇyapa
rōmarēśvaramahādēvā
ya tatprītayē prādātpulka
ṣpatōyasubhagaḥ
ṁttamāstāmidaṁ
jatanamupeddi¨rvvē
mabhūpasya maṁtrī paṭu
rapi ca purōdhāḥ kāṭaya
kṣmāpasūnōḥ . jayatu
jagadasēṣaṁ sēṣaśubhrai¨ryya
śōbhidhṛtadhavaḷīmaku¨rvva
n śaṁkaraśya prasādā[t .]
svasti śrīśakavaruṣaṁbulu
1308 Agunēṁṭi kṣa
ya saṁvatsara Adhika
Āṣāḍa śu 2 bu . Ama
rēśvaraśrīmanmahādēvaraku
ṁ buṣpālatōṁṭa kāṭamare
ḍḍi vēmireḍḍiṁgārikiṁ bu
ṇyamugānu jatanamupeddi
peṭṭiṁccenu śubhamastu [.]
Digital edition of SII 6.226Y by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
